specific_question: How many parking spaces are available at MediConn headquarters in 2024?
answer: A total of 50 parking spaces are available at MediConn headquarters in 2024.
justification: Parking availability is logistical and not related to CPPA privacy or compliance preparation.
dr_question: As the CPPA Act (Bill C-27) awaits parliamentary decision, how can MediConn build preparedness measures to ensure a smooth transition in the event the Act comes into effect by Q2 2026?
